D:\AAA_C\AAA_Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_huffman.dir/objects.a
D:\AAA_C\AAA_MinGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_huffman.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_huffman.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\AAA_C\AAA_MinGW\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_huffman.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\AAA_C\compression-tool\bin\test_huffman.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_huffman.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_huffman.dir\linkLibs.rsp
